summary: TWO_COLUMN: 10x10 table of Legendre symbol pairs for primes [3, 5, 7, ..., 31]. Each (p, q) cell colored GREEN if (p/q)(q/p) equals (-1)^((p-1)/2·(q-1)/2), RED otherwise (always GREEN — theorem holds). ValueTracker idx_tr scans all 100 cells with YELLOW scanner via always_redraw. Right column shows live p, q, (p/q), (q/p), expected sign.
